log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:15+3=18 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 17] FAIL!
→ 1/2 targets affected.
Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster activates Gem Flight! (2 uses remaining)
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster with Rock: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 13] HIT! 34 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 25/59

Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster activates Gem Flight! (1 uses remaining)

Frost Giant attacks Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster with Rock: [d20:13+9=22 vs AC 13] HIT! 28 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 0/59
→ Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 7 vs DC 14]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
